series_metadata.series_description: Dismissed Action: ethics grievance not certified to a formal action; Grievance received; unconditionally dismissed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 1 year - For unconditional dismissals, retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 1 year from the date of dismissal; then, shred physical file. ; Electronic: 1 year - For unconditional dismissals, retain electronic medium for a period of 1 year from the date of dismissal; then, delete electronic medium., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
